skills.name: Strike to Injure
skills.effectSummary: Adds +1 to injury rolls caused by the warrior in hand-to-hand combat.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Combat skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Combat Master
skills.effectSummary: Helps a warrior fight multiple opponents and avoid All Alone pressure.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Combat skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Weapons Training
skills.effectSummary: Allows use of hand-to-hand weapons beyond the warrior's normal equipment options.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Combat skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Quick Shot
skills.effectSummary: Allows two shots per turn with a bow or crossbow, subject to its listed exclusions.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Shooting skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Pistolier
skills.effectSummary: Improves pistol use, especially when the warrior carries a brace of pistols.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Shooting skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Weapons Expert
skills.effectSummary: Allows use of missile weapons beyond the warrior's normal equipment options.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Shooting skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Battle Tongue
skills.effectSummary: Extends the reach of a leader's command ability.
skills.restrictions: Leader only. Undead leaders cannot use it.

skills.name: Sorcery
skills.effectSummary: Improves spell casting rolls for eligible spellcasters.
skills.restrictions: Spellcasters only; Sisters of Sigmar and Warrior-Priests may not use it.

skills.name: Wyrdstone Hunter
skills.effectSummary: Helps the warband find wyrdstone during exploration.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Academic skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Mighty Blow
skills.effectSummary: Adds +1 Strength in close combat.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Strength skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Resilient
skills.effectSummary: Makes the warrior harder to wound.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Strength skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Strongman
skills.effectSummary: Allows the warrior to use a double-handed weapon without the usual strike-last drawback.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Strength skill access unless another rule grants access; Brutes start with it.

skills.name: Step Aside
skills.effectSummary: Gives an additional unmodified 5+ save against wounds suffered in close combat after other saves.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Speed skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Sprint
skills.effectSummary: Allows faster running movement.
skills.restrictions: Only heroes with Speed skill access unless another rule grants access.

skills.name: Sign of Sigmar
skills.effectSummary: Possessed or Undead opponents lose their first attack against the priestess in the first round of hand-to-hand combat, to a minimum of one attack.
skills.restrictions: Sisters of Sigmar heroines with access to the Special skill list.

skills.name: Protection of Sigmar
skills.effectSummary: Spells affecting the sister are nullified on a 4+ roll; if nullified, the spell affects no other models either.
skills.restrictions: Sisters of Sigmar heroines with access to the Special skill list.

skills.name: Utter Determination
skills.effectSummary: Allows the Matriarch to re-roll failed Rout tests.
skills.restrictions: Matriarch only.

skills.name: Righteous Fury
skills.effectSummary: The sister hates Skaven, Undead and Possessed warbands and all models in them.
skills.restrictions: Sisters of Sigmar heroines with access to the Special skill list.

skills.name: Absolute Faith
skills.effectSummary: The sister may re-roll Fear tests and does not test for fighting alone against several opponents.
skills.restrictions: Sisters of Sigmar heroines with access to the Special skill list.

skills.name: Black Hunger
skills.effectSummary: The hero may briefly gain extra attacks and movement, then suffers Strength 3 hits with no armour save.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Tail Fighting
skills.effectSummary: The Skaven may use its tail to gain an extra attack with a suitable weapon or a bonus to armour save with a shield.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Wall Runner
skills.effectSummary: The Skaven does not need to take Initiative tests when climbing walls and other sheer surfaces.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.effectSummary: The Skaven may be deployed after the opposing warband, outside enemy sight and beyond the listed distance.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Art of Silent Death
skills.effectSummary: The Skaven fights effectively unarmed, counts as having two weapons and causes critical hits on stronger wound rolls.
skills.restrictions: Skaven heroes with access to the Skaven Special skill list.

skills.name: Black Hunger
skills.effectSummary: At the beginning of his turn, the hero may gain +1 Attack and +D3 inches to total movement for that turn, then suffers D3 Strength 3 hits with no armour save at the end of the turn.
skills.restrictions: Clan Pestilens heroes with access to the Clan Pestilens Special skill list.
skills.pageRef: Town Cryer #29 / Clan Pestilens Special Skills

skills.name: Censer Bearer
skills.effectSummary: The hero becomes subject to Frenzy and may only use a Censer as his close combat weapon.
skills.restrictions: Requires Black Hunger. Clan Pestilens heroes with access to the Clan Pestilens Special skill list.
skills.pageRef: Town Cryer #29 / Clan Pestilens Special Skills

skills.name: Rotten Body
skills.effectSummary: The hero is immune to poison and diseases. If taken out of action by a failed Censer fumes test, he recovers automatically after the battle instead of rolling for injuries.
skills.restrictions: Clan Pestilens heroes with access to the Clan Pestilens Special skill list.
skills.pageRef: Town Cryer #29 / Clan Pestilens Special Skills

skills.name: Contagious
skills.effectSummary: A model that puts this hero out of action in close combat must take a Toughness test. If the D6 result is higher than its Toughness, it suffers an automatic wound; a 6 always wounds. Undead and Possessed are immune.
skills.restrictions: Requires Rotten Body. Clan Pestilens heroes with access to the Clan Pestilens Special skill list.
skills.pageRef: Town Cryer #29 / Clan Pestilens Special Skills

skills.name: Ignore Pain
skills.effectSummary: The hero treats Stunned injury results as Knocked Down instead.
skills.restrictions: Requires the Resilient Strength skill. Clan Pestilens heroes with access to the Clan Pestilens Special skill list.
skills.pageRef: Town Cryer #29 / Clan Pestilens Special Skills

skills.name: 'Ard Ead
skills.effectSummary: The Orc has a 3+ save to treat stunned as knocked down instead; with a helmet this becomes 2+ and replaces the normal helmet rule.
skills.restrictions: Orc heroes with access to the Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: Waaagh!
skills.effectSummary: The Orc may add +D3 inches to his charge range.
skills.restrictions: Orc heroes with access to the Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: 'Ere We Go!
skills.effectSummary: The Orc may ignore Fear and Terror tests when charging.
skills.restrictions: Orc heroes with access to the Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: Da Cunnin' Plan
skills.effectSummary: The warband may re-roll failed Rout tests while the Boss is not out of action.
skills.restrictions: Orc Boss only.

skills.name: Well 'Ard
skills.effectSummary: The Orc adds +1 to any armour saves.
skills.restrictions: Orc heroes with access to the Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: 'Eadbasher
skills.effectSummary: Knocked down results caused by the Orc in hand-to-hand combat count as stunned instead.
skills.restrictions: Orc heroes with access to the Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: Proven Warrior
skills.effectSummary: The upgraded Young'un is now treated as a full Black Orc Warrior while retaining the Young'un title. He follows Black Orc rules, uses the Black Orc equipment list and gains the same skill access as a Black Orc.
skills.restrictions: Black Orc Young'un only; requires the Black Orc Blood upgrade and 25 experience.

skills.name: 'Ard Ead
skills.effectSummary: The warrior has a 3+ save to treat stunned as knocked down instead. If he also wears a helmet, this becomes 2+ and replaces the normal helmet rule.
skills.restrictions: Black Orc heroes with access to the Black Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: Waaagh!
skills.effectSummary: The warrior may add +D3 inches to his charge range.
skills.restrictions: Black Orc heroes with access to the Black Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: 'Ere We Go!
skills.effectSummary: The model may ignore Fear and Terror tests when charging.
skills.restrictions: Black Orc heroes with access to the Black Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: Da Cunnin' Plan
skills.effectSummary: The warband may re-roll failed Rout tests as long as the Boss is not out of action.
skills.restrictions: Black Orc Boss only.

skills.name: 'Eadbasher
skills.effectSummary: Knocked down results caused by the warrior in hand-to-hand combat count as stunned instead.
skills.restrictions: Black Orc heroes with access to the Black Orc Special skill list.

skills.name: Shaggy Hide
skills.effectSummary: The Beastman gains a 6+ armour save from its shaggy hide. This can be combined with other armour as normal.
skills.restrictions: Beastmen Heroes with access to the Beastmen Special skill list.

skills.name: Mutant
skills.effectSummary: The Beastman may buy one mutation. The exact mutation purchase remains a manual roster note until mutation options are fully seeded.
skills.restrictions: Beastmen Heroes with access to the Beastmen Special skill list.

skills.name: Fearless
skills.effectSummary: The Beastman is immune to fear, terror and All Alone tests.
skills.restrictions: Beastmen Heroes with access to the Beastmen Special skill list.

skills.name: Horned One
skills.effectSummary: On a turn in which the Beastman charges, he makes one additional attack with his basic Strength using his horns.
skills.restrictions: Beastmen Heroes with access to the Beastmen Special skill list.

skills.name: Bellowing Roar
skills.effectSummary: The Beastmen Chief may re-roll failed Rout tests.
skills.restrictions: Beastmen Chief only.

skills.name: Manhater
skills.effectSummary: The Beastman is affected by Hatred when fighting Human warbands.
skills.restrictions: Beastmen Heroes with access to the Beastmen Special skill list.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.effectSummary: The warrior deploys after the opposing warband, out of enemy sight and more than 12 inches from enemy models.
skills.restrictions: Shadow Warrior heroes with access to the Shadow Warrior Special skill list.

skills.name: See in Shadows
skills.effectSummary: If the warrior has enough movement to reach an unseen opponent, he may always roll to charge that model instead of using the normal 4 inch limit.
skills.restrictions: Shadow Warrior heroes with access to the Shadow Warrior Special skill list.

skills.name: Hide in Shadows
skills.effectSummary: Enemies attempting to detect this warrior while Hidden halve their Initiative before measuring spotting distance.
skills.restrictions: Shadow Warrior heroes with access to the Shadow Warrior Special skill list.

skills.name: Sniper
skills.effectSummary: If Hidden, the warrior may shoot or cast spells and remain Hidden unless the target survives and passes the listed spotting test.
skills.restrictions: Shadow Warrior heroes with access to the Shadow Warrior Special skill list.

skills.name: Powerful Build
skills.effectSummary: The warrior may choose from the Strength skill table from now on.
skills.restrictions: Shadow Master or Shadow Walker only; no more than two warriors in the warband may have this skill.

skills.name: Master of Runes
skills.effectSummary: When using Elven Runestones, the Shadow Weaver gains +1 to the dispel roll and may inscribe one ally's weapons or armour to re-roll one failed armour save or Parry roll once per battle.
skills.restrictions: Shadow Weaver only.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.effectSummary: The warrior deploys after the opposing warband, out of enemy sight and more than 12 inches from enemy models.
skills.restrictions: Skink Priest or Skink Great Crest only.

skills.name: Great Hunter
skills.effectSummary: Adds +1 to Injury rolls caused by the Skink Great Crest's shooting attacks.
skills.restrictions: Skink Great Crest only.

skills.name: Bellowing Battle Roar
skills.effectSummary: If the Saurus Totem Warrior is not hidden, engaged, knocked down, stunned or out of action, friendly Skinks within 6 inches may use his Leadership for tests.
skills.restrictions: Saurus Totem Warrior only.

skills.name: Toughened Hide
skills.effectSummary: Improves the Saurus Totem Warrior's Scaly Skin armour save by +1.
skills.restrictions: Saurus Totem Warrior only.

skills.name: Shed Animosity
skills.effectSummary: Campaign advance option: a Forest Goblin Brave may remove Animosity instead of choosing a normal skill.
skills.restrictions: Forest Goblin Brave only; record the advance and ignore that Brave's Animosity in play.

skills.name: Master of Blades
skills.effectSummary: When using a weapon with Parry, the Dwarf parries if he beats or matches the enemy's highest to-hit roll. With two parry weapons he may parry two attacks; with two Dwarf Axes he may re-roll failed parries.
skills.restrictions: Dwarf Heroes with access to the Dwarf Special skill list.

skills.name: Extra Tough
skills.effectSummary: After a game in which this Hero was taken out of action, he may re-roll once on the Heroes Serious Injury chart. The second result must be kept.
skills.restrictions: Dwarf Heroes with access to the Dwarf Special skill list.

skills.name: Resource Hunter
skills.effectSummary: When rolling on the Exploration chart after a game, this Hero may modify one exploration die by +1 or -1.
skills.restrictions: Dwarf Heroes with access to the Dwarf Special skill list.

skills.name: True Grit
skills.effectSummary: When rolling on the Injury table for this Hero, treat 1-3 as knocked down, 4-5 as stunned, and 6 as out of action.
skills.restrictions: Dwarf Heroes with access to the Dwarf Special skill list.

skills.name: Thick Skull
skills.effectSummary: The Hero has a 3+ D6 save to treat a stunned result as knocked down instead. If he also wears a helmet, this becomes 2+ and replaces the normal helmet rule.
skills.restrictions: Dwarf Heroes with access to the Dwarf Special skill list.

skills.name: Ferocious Charge
skills.effectSummary: The Slayer may double his Attacks on the turn he charges, but suffers -1 to hit for that turn.
skills.restrictions: Dwarf Troll Slayers with access to the Troll Slayer Special skill list.

skills.name: Monster Slayer
skills.effectSummary: In close combat the Slayer always wounds on 4+ unless his modified Strength would already wound on a better roll.
skills.restrictions: Dwarf Troll Slayers with access to the Troll Slayer Special skill list.

skills.name: Berserker
skills.effectSummary: The Slayer adds +1 to close combat to-hit rolls during the turn in which he charges.
skills.restrictions: Dwarf Troll Slayers with access to the Troll Slayer Special skill list.
